pageContext.name: Ruby Slippers
pageContext.description: Procure a pair of Ruby Slippers without having to drop a house on a witch!  Sideshow and Paragon FX Group present these painstakingly reproduced, iconic ruby slipper props from the 1939 classic THE WIZARD OF OZ! Using the latest reference available from the film, the Smithsonian, and other sources, Paragon is pleased to bring you what we feel are the most accurate pair of ruby slippers to date.  Every gem sample, sequin sample, leather sample, and more was personally approved by our team to ensure that these slippers mimic what Dorothy would have had on her feet while taking that long walk down the yellow brick road.  It doesn't take a brain, heart, or courage to know that the Ruby Slippers are one of the most iconic props in the history of film, so order today and be among the few to own this museum-quality replica.
